film.title: Anpadh
film.overview: A wealthy, pampered and illiterate woman faces many challenges after her marriage.

dialogues.dialogue: Don't say written by you, but got it written. You are disgracing our family by getting it written by a servant? Aren't you ashamed? You mannerless! She is. How could you write it? Aren't you ashamed to get it written by a servant?
dialogues.cause_raw: getting a letter written by a servant

dialogues.dialogue: Aren't you ashamed? You mannerless! She is. How could you write it? Aren't you ashamed to get it written by a servant? You must have complained about me. You must have abused me. Must have put me down. I understand you and your brother.
You can neither cook nor sew or read and write. Are you alone? Have you no shame? Have you no sisters? Get lost! Or I'll hand you to the police!
dialogues.cause_raw: lack of domestic skills and literacy

dialogues.dialogue: And I haven't yet got the girl. - Talk to her mother. - Why don't you do it? - I feel shy. - Am I shameless? Not shameless but a lawyer. Let go... just a thought... ask your servant to talk to mother.
dialogues.cause_raw: feeling shy to talk to a girl's mother

dialogues.dialogue: - Talk to her mother. - Why don't you do it? - I feel shy. - Am I shameless? Not shameless but a lawyer. Let go... just a thought... ask your servant to talk to mother. Don't ever call him a servant.
dialogues.cause_raw: being asked to do something he is uncomfortable with

dialogues.dialogue: Mother! Who...?Who let you in? Who are you? If you find out who I am you'll die of shame! Wish you'd drowned before attacking the family honour! What are you sayi ng? Who the heck are you?

I caused pain to your delicate heart. I'll compensate it. I'll teach you personally. I'll make you a worthy person that......people feel proud of you one day. Smile once......which will brighten up your Deepak's life. Just once for your Deepak.
I'll avenge my humiliation. Don't be foolish. Come to senses. If you can not make your family proud, atleast don't disgrace it. Go away from here. Murder... murder... What are you waiting for?
